message:
fix(core): five bugs — counter overflow, percentile calc, float truncations, alert summary

1. sharded_counter.rs: Use saturating_add fold instead of .sum() to
   prevent silent u64 wraparound when aggregating across shards.

2. slo_conformance.rs: Fix p99 percentile using proper nearest-rank
   formula (ceil(P/100 * N) - 1) instead of ceil(P/100 * (N-1)) which
   returned the max value instead of the 99th percentile.

3. replay.rs: Round f64→u64 conversion in playback delay calculation
   and duration parser to prevent systematic truncation bias at high
   playback speeds.

4. replay_guide.rs: Round ETA millisecond calculation to prevent
   truncation.

5. alerts.rs: Include deficit percentage in AccountBalance alert
   summary for consistency with all other alert types.

21,288 lib tests pass. No regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
